place_of_offence.address: room 2110, 21st floor, Hoi Yan House, Hoi Fu Court, No.2 Hoi Ting Road, Tai Kok Tsui, Kowloon
place_of_offence.source: on 2 April 2022, at room 2110, 21st floor, Hoi Yan House, Hoi Fu Court, No.2 Hoi Ting Road, Tai Kok Tsui, Kowloon

trafficking_mode.source: the paraphernalia of the trafficker were found inside the premises, namely two different types of dangerous drugs contained in smaller re-sealable bags of drugs, multiple empty re-sealable plastic bags and an electronic scale... This was... a rather more active, albeit on a small scale, centre for the distribution, packaging and consumption of different dangerous drugs

reasons_for_offence.source: At the time of sentencing, the applicant was a former drug abuser aged 68
